name: network-state-closeout
description: Guide private network-state initialization, maintain and privately synchronize verified records, then produce separate status and process closeout cards.

interface.shortDescription: Maintain private network facts and close out completed actions.
interface.longDescription: Guide first-time private network-state setup, optionally connect a GitHub private repository with a mandatory latest-state gate, maintain verified records, and turn completed actions into separate status and process cards.
defaultPrompt: Use $initialize-network-state to create or adopt my private profile without scanning the network.
Use $initialize-network-state to guide me through connecting a confirmed GitHub private repository.
Sync my GitHub private network state, update confirmed facts, then write status and process cards.
Write closeout cards for the completed action without changing network records.
